channel.title: Maine Commission on Governmental Ethics and Election Practices — Notices
channel.description:
Homepage 'Notices' section is a flat sequence of

entries with no dates or list wrapper; monitored by full-page fingerprint.

item.title: Page updated: Maine Commission on Governmental Ethics and Election Practices — Notices
item.description:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + July 15, 2026 + : Local Party Committee First Half of 2026 Semiannual Report due Removed: - July 3, 2026 - : Office Closed - Independence Day (observed)

item.title: Page updated: Maine Commission on Governmental Ethics and Election Practices — Notices
item.description:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + Information on Public Comments for Proposed Rulemaking Removed: - Interim Campaign Finance Reporting Information - Information on Public Hearing for Proposed Rulemaking - 2 - 026 Registered Candidates as of 6/10/2026 2:00 pm - Candidates in yellow have registered since 1/16/2026. - Interim Campaign Finance Reporting Information - for MCEA Requests for Certification, and Special Elections (candidates and committees). - Archived Campaign Reporting | 2008 through 2025

item.title: Page updated: Maine Commission on Governmental Ethics and Election Practices — Notices
item.description:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Removed: - Information on Public Comments for Proposed Rulemaking
